files.patch:
@@ -405,7 +405,7 @@ {"id":"bd-2fp5r","title":"Layout Core Framework (Constraints + Compaction)","description":"Background\n- We need a deterministic layout engine reusable across diagram types.\n- Layout beauty is prioritized over strict spec fidelity.\n\nScope\n- Layout primitives: NodeBox, Port, ClusterBox, RouteGrid.\n- Implement constraint system (VPSC or longest-path compaction).\n- Sugiyama layering support hooks for flowcharts (layers, crossing minimization passes).\n- Cluster packing and nested subgraph layout with padding + margins.\n- Coarse-to-fine layout: initial coarse placement → compaction/refinement.\n- Objective scoring for tie-breaks: crossings, bends, variance, symmetry, alignment.\n\nConsiderations\n- Deterministic results under ties; no RNG.\n- Scale to large graphs with bounded heuristics and early exits.\n- Layout outputs world units, not terminal cells.\n\nTests / Validation\n- Unit tests for constraints and compaction.\n- Invariant checks: no overlaps, stable ordering under equal cost.\n\nSuccess Criteria\n- Produces non-overlapping layouts for supported diagrams.\n- Deterministic output for fixed input.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-04T18:38:57.851893409Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-04T19:06:24.577878242Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2fp5r","depends_on_id":"bd-1ri6i","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T18:41:56.128093077Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2fp5r","depends_on_id":"bd-2oovu","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T19:00:01.016976338Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]} {"id":"bd-2fva","title":"CLI help text screen numbers out of sync with ScreenId::ALL order","description":"The HELP_TEXT in cli.rs lists screens in a different order than the actual ScreenId::ALL array: - Help says CLI 11 = Macro Recorder, but code has CLI 11 = TerminalCapabilities - Help says CLI 22 = Virtualized Search, but code has CLI 22 = FormValidation, CLI 23 = VirtualizedSearch This causes confusion when writing E2E tests that reference screens by number. Fix: Regenerate the HELP_TEXT to match the actual ScreenId::ALL array order.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-02-03T18:13:58.927035352Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-03T18:16:06.246261068Z","closed_at":"2026-02-03T18:16:06.246243435Z","close_reason":"Fixed CLI help text to match actual ScreenId::ALL order. Updated test assertion for Visual Effects screen number.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0} {"id":"bd-2fx","title":"Implement export adapters (HTML/SVG/Text)","description":"PHASE 7 EXTRAS - EXPORT ADAPTERS ## Background Export adapters allow saving terminal UI output to various formats for sharing, documentation, and testing. ## Technical Requirements ### Export Formats #### HTML Export pub struct HtmlExporter { include_css: bool, class_prefix: String, font_family: String, } impl HtmlExporter { pub fn export(&self, buffer: &Buffer, pool: &GraphemePool) -> String { // Generate HTML with inline styles or CSS classes // Map colors to CSS colors // Handle wide characters with spans } } Output: 
Bold red
#### SVG Export pub struct SvgExporter { font_size: f32, cell_width: f32, cell_height: f32, background: Color, } impl SvgExporter { pub fn export(&self, buffer: &Buffer, pool: &GraphemePool) -> String { // Generate SVG with text elements // Position text precisely // Handle colors as fill attributes } } #### Plain Text Export pub struct TextExporter { strip_styles: bool, include_ansi: bool, } impl TextExporter { pub fn export(&self, buffer: &Buffer, pool: &GraphemePool) -> String { // strip_styles: just content // include_ansi: full ANSI sequences } } ### Frame Capture pub struct FrameCapture { buffer: Buffer, pool: GraphemePool, timestamp: Instant, } impl Frame { pub fn capture(&self) -> FrameCapture { // Clone current state for export } } ### Session Recording (Optional) pub struct SessionRecorder { frames: Vec, max_frames: usize, } impl SessionRecorder { pub fn record(&mut self, frame: &Frame); pub fn export_gif(&self) -> Vec; // Feature: gif pub fn export_asciinema(&self) -> String; // Feature: asciinema } ## Tests Required - [ ] HTML export preserves colors - [ ] HTML escape special chars - [ ] SVG dimensions correct - [ ] SVG text positioning - [ ] Plain text strips ANSI - [ ] Wide characters handled - [ ] Empty buffer exports cleanly ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] HTML exporter with CSS - [ ] SVG exporter with fonts - [ ] Plain text exporter - [ ] Frame capture API - [ ] Optional session recording - [ ] Feature gate: export ## Location: ftui-extras crate (feature = "export")","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-31T22:38:54.774907037Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T20:33:49.529145826Z","closed_at":"2026-02-01T20:33:49.529123404Z","close_reason":"Implemented HTML, SVG, and Text export adapters with 32 passing tests","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2fx","depends_on_id":"bd-10i.3.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-03T14:32:17Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2fx","depends_on_id":"bd-10i.3.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-03T14:32:17Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]} -{"id":"bd-2fyni","title":"Workspace sync to enable rebase/push","description":"Administrative: commit current working tree changes from concurrent agents to allow git pull --rebase and push. No functional edits beyond consolidating state.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-04T21:35:57.939415191Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-04T21:35:57.939415191Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0} +{"id":"bd-2fyni","title":"Workspace sync to enable rebase/push","description":"Administrative: commit current working tree changes from concurrent agents to allow git pull --rebase and push. No functional edits beyond consolidating state.","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-04T21:35:57.939415191Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-05T01:02:59.832499642Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0} {"id":"bd-2gbg","title":"Live auto-refresh: guard zero/invalid rate and avoid self-join","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-02-02T02:39:01.336571098Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-02T02:43:07.115017130Z","closed_at":"2026-02-02T02:43:07.114999327Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0} {"id":"bd-2gx","title":"Track Quality Gates (v1 Stop-Ship Criteria)","description":"# Quality Gates: v1 Stop-Ship Criteria ## Background Plan Section 0.7 defines four quality gates that are STOP-SHIP if failing. These must be tracked and verified before v1 release. ## Quality Gates ### Gate 1: Inline Mode Stability (CRITICAL) **Requirement:** Re-rendering UI region while streaming logs cannot corrupt scrollback or cursor placement. **Verification:** - [ ] PTY test: continuous log stream + periodic UI refresh does not corrupt scrollback - [ ] PTY test: cursor returns to correct position after every present() - [ ] PTY test: resize during active logging re-anchors correctly - [ ] Manual test: 10-minute stress test with rapid log output - [ ] Tested on: Linux terminal, tmux, macOS Terminal, WezTerm, Kitty **Blocking beads:** bd-fbp (overlay redraw), bd-10i.11.2 (PTY tests) ### Gate 2: Diff/Presenter Correctness **Requirement:** Property tests validate that applying presenter output to a terminal-model yields the expected grid for supported ops. **Verification:** - [ ] proptest: BufferDiff.compute() identifies all changes - [ ] proptest: applying Presenter output to TerminalModel matches source Buffer - [ ] proptest: style state never "leaks" across runs - [ ] proptest: OSC 8 links properly opened and closed - [ ] 1000+ random buffer property test passes **Blocking beads:** bd-10i.11.1 (terminal-model), bd-10i.4.3 (Presenter) ### Gate 3: Unicode Width Correctness **Requirement:** Test suite includes emoji/ZWJ/combining marks; no off-by-one wrapping errors. **Verification:** - [ ] Width corpus test: ASCII (all printable) - [ ] Width corpus test: CJK wide characters - [ ] Width corpus test: Common emoji (🎉, ❤️, 🔥, etc.) - [ ] Width corpus test: ZWJ sequences (👨‍👩‍👧‍👦, 👩‍💻, etc.) - [ ] Width corpus test: Combining marks (é = e + ́) - [ ] Width corpus test: Regional indicators (🇺🇸 = U+1F1FA + U+1F1F8) - [ ] Text wrapping test: no mid-grapheme breaks - [ ] Truncation test: ellipsis at correct position **Blocking beads:** bd-16k (Unicode width corpus), bd-2uk (Text type) ### Gate 4: Terminal Cleanup **Requirement:** PTY tests verify raw mode + cursor visibility + alt screen restoration after normal exit and panic. **Verification:** - [ ] PTY test: normal exit restores cursor visibility - [ ] PTY test: normal exit disables raw mode - [ ] PTY test: normal exit disables mouse mode - [ ] PTY test: normal exit disables bracketed paste - [ ] PTY test: alt screen exited on cleanup - [ ] PTY test: PANIC during render triggers cleanup - [ ] PTY test: IO error mid-write triggers cleanup - [ ] Verified panic hook installed correctly **Blocking beads:** bd-10i.2.6 (TerminalSession), bd-10i.11.2 (PTY tests) ## CI Integration - All gates must pass on every PR to main - Gates are blocking (not advisory) - Gate status visible in CI summary ## Documentation When all gates pass, update CHANGELOG.md with: - "v1 Quality Gates: PASSED" - Date and commit hash of verification ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] All Gate 1 tests implemented and passing - [ ] All Gate 2 tests implemented and passing - [ ] All Gate 3 tests implemented and passing - [ ] All Gate 4 tests implemented and passing - [ ] Gates integrated into CI - [ ] All gates green before v1 tag","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-31T23:17:48.962577656Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-02T01:47:07.826687211Z","closed_at":"2026-02-02T01:47:07.826604505Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2gx","depends_on_id":"bd-10i.11","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-03T14:32:17Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2gx","depends_on_id":"bd-10i.11.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-03T14:32:17Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2gx","depends_on_id":"bd-10i.11.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-03T14:32:17Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2gx","depends_on_id":"bd-10i.2.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-03T14:32:17Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2gx","depends_on_id":"bd-16k","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-03T14:32:17Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2gx","depends_on_id":"bd-2x0j","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-03T14:32:17Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2gx","depends_on_id":"bd-fbp","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-03T14:32:17Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":365,"issue_id":"bd-2gx","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Quality Gate Assessment: - Gate 1 (Inline Stability): 5 e2e tests, basic coverage. Missing streaming+resize+cursor tests. - Gate 2 (Diff/Presenter): 30+ tests including 8 property tests. Good coverage. Missing OSC 8 link property tests and full presenter→terminal-model roundtrip property test. - Gate 3 (Unicode Width): 1000+ tests with comprehensive corpus and property tests. Excellent coverage. Minor gap in wrap/truncation edge cases. - Gate 4 (Terminal Cleanup): 40+ tests, infrastructure solid. Missing e2e tests for mouse/bracketed-paste/focus/kitty cleanup and panic path verification. Most critical gaps: Gate 1 needs property tests, Gate 4 needs e2e activation tests for individual cleanup modes. Gates 2 and 3 are in good shape.","created_at":"2026-02-02T01:42:14Z"},{"id":366,"issue_id":"bd-2gx","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Quality gate improvements applied: - Gate 2: Added 4 OSC 8 hyperlink presenter tests (emitted_with_registry, not_emitted_without, closed_at_frame_end, transitions_between_links). All passing. - Gate 4: Added 4 new e2e cleanup tests (mouse_disabled, bracketed_paste_disabled, altscreen_exit, altscreen_mouse_focus). All 7 cleanup tests passing. - Gate 3: Already excellent with 1000+ unicode width corpus tests. - Gate 1: 5 e2e inline mode tests passing. Remaining gap is property-level stress testing. - All 2200+ workspace tests passing, zero failures.","created_at":"2026-02-02T01:47:02Z"}]} {"id":"bd-2hxl1","title":"Edge Routing Engine (Orthogonal + Obstacle-Aware)","description":"Background\n- Terminal diagrams need orthogonal routing with minimal crossings.\n- Edges must avoid node boxes and reserved label zones.\n\nScope\n- Routing grid with obstacles for nodes + labels.\n- A* search with penalties for bends, crossings, and length.\n- Deterministic port selection with stable tie-breaks.\n- Route simplification and grid alignment.\n- Handle self-loops, multi-edges, and parallel edges with offset lanes.\n- Optional edge bundling for parallel segments to reduce visual clutter.\n\nConsiderations\n- Deterministic results even under symmetric graphs.\n- Provide routing diagnostics (cost, bends, crossings) for evidence logs.\n\nTests / Validation\n- Unit tests for routing on canonical layouts.\n- Regression tests for obstacle and parallel-edge cases.\n\nSuccess Criteria\n- Routes avoid nodes/labels and remain within bounds.\n- Bend count and crossings minimized under constraints.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-04T18:39:03.744427318Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-04T19:06:29.951343744Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2hxl1","depends_on_id":"bd-2fp5r","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T18:41:59.217046520Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2hxl1","depends_on_id":"bd-2oovu","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T19:00:01.246976429Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
